About

A bridge builder
in game development

I'm a game developer and producer based near Barcelona, with a background that spans production, design, programming, and team communication. I work best at the intersection of disciplines — translating vision into execution.

I co-founded Project Legends, the studio behind Soccer Legends, a mobile soccer RPG with gacha mechanics, where I led fundraising and cross-functional team coordination from the ground up.

More recently I served as a startup mentor in Riyadh for the Saudi Game Champions program (GameBCN), coaching early-stage game studios through production pipelines, game design fundamentals, and team development — from first prototype to launch.

My core strength is bridging communication across developer, artist, and designer teams — making sure nothing falls through the cracks and that creative ambition stays grounded in reality.

1.5+
Years mentoring startups internationally
3
Core disciplines: production, design, programming
∞
Passion for games — from Pokémon to indie gems
BCN
Based near Barcelona, working globally
Services

How I can
help you

🎮

Producer

End-to-end production management for game projects. I keep timelines, teams, and creative vision aligned.

  • Project planning & roadmapping
  • Cross-team communication & coordination
  • Milestone tracking & risk management
  • Pitch decks & stakeholder reporting
✏️

Game Designer

Systems, mechanics, and player experience design. From core loops to full GDD documentation.

  • Core loop & mechanic design
  • Monetisation strategy (gacha, IAP)
  • Game Design Documents (GDD)
  • Playtesting & iteration
💻

Programmer

Hands-on development support. Prototyping, tooling, and technical guidance for game teams.

  • Prototype development
  • Tool & pipeline scripting
  • Technical documentation
  • Code reviews & architecture advice
🔍

Team Audits

An objective outside eye on your studio's processes, communication, and output quality.

  • Production pipeline review
  • Team structure & role clarity
  • Communication bottleneck analysis
  • Actionable improvement report
🚀

Mentorship

Tailored mentorship for indie studios and developers navigating early-stage game production.

  • 1-on-1 or team sessions
  • Early-stage studio guidance
  • Career path coaching
  • International game industry perspective
Projects

Selected
work

⚽
Mobile RPG Gacha

Soccer Legends

Mobile soccer RPG with gacha mechanics. Co-founded Project Legends, led production, fundraising, and cross-functional coordination from concept to launch.

View project →
🤖
Prototype Blender Low-poly

Robo Project

A low-poly game prototype featuring piece-swapping modular robots. Currently in active development — modeling phase targeting May 2025.

In progress →
Blog

Thoughts &
dispatches

Originally published on LinkedIn — readable here.

April 2025

Why I left a comfortable role in Riyadh to build what's next

After 1.5 years mentoring game startups across Saudi Arabia, I made the call to come back. Here's what I learned — and what I'm building toward.

Read more →
March 2025

What gacha games taught me about game design fundamentals

Building Soccer Legends with gacha mechanics forced me to think deeply about motivation loops, player psychology, and ethical monetisation. My honest take.

Read more →
February 2025

On being a generalist in an industry that rewards specialists

Producer. Designer. Programmer. Communicator. Being good at many things is an underrated superpower — but only if you know how to frame it.

Read more →

together.

Whether you need a producer to steer your project, an audit of your team's process, or a mentorship partner — I'm open to conversations.
